_damageComment: HUNTER-TOOLS v1 damage tuning (all hot-tunable, no rebuild). base = damage a hunter's rifle does to an undisguised player (10 => 10 hits to kill at defaultMult). A disguised prop-player scales that by a SIZE multiplier lerped between smallSize/largeSize (metres, = 2*max half-extent of the disguise's footprint — the SAME size source physics bakes colliders from, so it auto-upgrades to measured bounds). smallMult (tiny, e.g. burger ~0.72 m => dies in ~2 hits at 50 dmg) lerps down to largeMult (big, e.g. table ~2.25 m => ~3x the default player's bullets at ~3.4 dmg). Sizes at/below smallSize clamp to smallMult; at/above largeSize clamp to largeMult. defaultMult applies to an UNDISGUISED player (no size). selfScalesWithSize: shooting a decoy object that COULD have been a player bounces the SAME size-scaled damage back onto the hunter (real architecture is a free miss).
